messages.content: Refactor insecure user lookup to parameterized queryExecute with integer id.
Add safe login query using email and active flag with proper SQL types.
Create date-bounded audit query using cf_sql_timestamp parameters.
Build delete method using UUID parameter and strict queryExecute binding.
Render user-supplied display name safely in HTML and profile URL safely in URL context.
Add CSRF token validation for state-changing form submission.
Write a secure file upload validator for mime type and max size.
Enforce secure session hardening flags in Application.cfc style setup method.
Store and invalidate a session security token using a dedicated named cache region. The token must expire automatically. Use CF2023+ named cache regions.

safetyNote: Named cache regions require CF2023+ and server-side cache configuration. In CF10-CF2021, use application-scope struct with cflock and a background cleanup task.
